posts.text: BREAKING: The UAE is planning to build a new port and container terminal on the country's east cost to bypass the Strait of Hormuz, per FT. Details include: 1. Dubai's DP World is in talks to develop a new multipurpose port in the coastal area of Fujairah 2. The new project would allow containers to enter and leave the country without having to pass through the Strait of Hormuz 3. Shipments would then be moved on trucks overland to Dubai, Abu Dhabi, and neighboring Gulf countries The Iran War continues to reshape global trade.
posts.author: KobeissiLetter
